cloudSync.syncIncludesCuratedArtists: This sync also merges curated artist records together with fingerprints.
cloudSync.curatedArtistSkippedUnsupported: The server is on an older version. Curated artist sync was skipped and fingerprint sync still completed.
cloudSync.needUserKeyBeforeDanger: You must configure userKey before performing this dangerous operation. Opening settings...

errors.alreadyLatest: Cloud data is already up to date
errors.sensitiveOperationTooFrequent: Sensitive ops too frequent. Try later.
errors.curatedArtistValidationFailed: Curated artist sync payload validation failed
errors.rateLimitWarning8: FYI: 8 syncs in 5 min. This is 9th. To avoid rate limiting, retry in {seconds}s
errors.rateLimitWarning9: FYI: 9 syncs in 5 min. This is 10th. Retry in {seconds}s
errors.limitExceeded: Server fingerprint quota exceeded (limit: {limit}). Sync aborted.
errors.limitExceededOnCheck: Would exceed server fingerprint quota (limit: {limit}). Sync aborted.

limit.willExceedHint: This sync would exceed the quota limit and has been cancelled.

summary.analyze: Final total {final} would exceed the limit

reset.title: Dangerous: Reset cloud sync data
reset.description: This will delete all cloud fingerprints, curated artist snapshots, and related metadata linked to the current userKey on the server (usage stats are not reset). IRREVERSIBLE. Type DELETE to continue.
